seo.title: Building AI Email Assistant with LlamaIndex + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai email assistant with LlamaIndex + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Email Assistant with LlamaIndex enables intelligent email processing by indexing email histories, detecting user intents, generating context-aware drafts, and handling attachments. LlamaIndex's retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) connects LLMs to email data sources seamlessly. Guardrails via Vex are essential to mitigate risks like irrelevant retrievals, hallucinations, PII leaks, and inappropriate tones in high-stakes email communications.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Email Assistant Architecture with LlamaIndex
architectureOverview.description:
The architecture begins with email ingestion using LlamaIndex's Document loaders to parse inbox data from IMAP/API sources, creating searchable indexes of email threads, contacts, and attachments. Intent detection classifies incoming emails (e.g., 'respond', 'forward', 'archive') via a query engine over the index. Draft generation retrieves relevant context (past threads, user preferences) and synthesizes responses with an LLM synthesizer, followed by approval workflows that validate tone, PII, and accuracy before sending.

Key components include VectorStoreIndex for semantic search, metadata filters for recipient/contact validation, and post-retrieval processors to refine context chunks. Attachment handling embeds file content into the index, while workflows integrate with email APIs (Gmail/Outlook) for send operations. This RAG pipeline ensures responses are grounded in user history but requires verification to prevent errors like outdated context or confidential leaks.

risks.name: Retrieved context irrelevant to query
risks.description: Vector search pulls unrelated email threads, leading to off-topic or confusing responses.
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies response relevance against query intent and source documents before draft generation.

risks.name: Synthesizer hallucinating beyond source documents
risks.description: LLM fabricates details not present in retrieved emails, risking inaccurate replies.
risks.mitigation: Vex enforces strict grounding checks, flagging hallucinations with citation traceability.

risks.name: PII filtering failures
risks.description: Sensitive data like SSNs or addresses leaks into drafts sent to wrong recipients.
risks.mitigation: Vex scans outputs with NER models to redact/block PII before approval workflow.

risks.name: Tone appropriateness violations
risks.description: Generates aggressive, informal, or unprofessional language unsuitable for recipients.
risks.mitigation: Vex sentiment analysis ensures professional tone matching recipient relationship metadata.

implementation.title: Email Ingestion and Indexing
implementation.description: Load emails into LlamaIndex VectorStoreIndex for semantic retrieval of relevant threads.
implementation.code:
from llama_index.core import VectorStoreIndex, SimpleDirectoryReader, StorageContext
from llama_index.vector_stores.qdrant import QdrantVectorStore
import qdrant_client

# Load email .eml files from directory
reader = SimpleDirectoryReader(input_dir="./emails", file_extractor={'.eml': EmailExtractor()})
documents = reader.load_data()

# Create persistent vector index
client = qdrant_client.QdrantClient(path "./qdrant_db")
vector_store = QdrantVectorStore(client=client, collection_name="email_threads")
storage_context = StorageContext.from_defaults(vector_store=vector_store)
index = VectorStoreIndex.from_documents(documents, storage_context=storage_context)

query_engine = index.as_query_engine(similarity_top_k=5)

implementation.title: Intent Detection Query Engine
implementation.description: Classify email intent using metadata-filtered retrieval over indexed email history.
implementation.code:
from llama_index.core import PromptTemplate

intent_prompt = PromptTemplate(
    "Classify this email intent: {query_str}\nContext: {context_str}\nIntent: "
)

intent_engine = index.as_query_engine(
    node_postprocessors=[
        MetadataReplacementPostProcessor(target_metadata_key="category")
    ],
    similarity_top_k=3
)

# Detect intent
intent_response = intent_engine.query("User asking about invoice #12345")
print(intent_response)  # 'payment_request'

implementation.title: Draft Generation with Context Retrieval
implementation.description: Generate email drafts grounded in retrieved email history and attachments.
implementation.code:
from llama_index.llms.openai import OpenAI
llm = OpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

response_synthesizer = get_response_synthesizer(
    llm=llm,
    response_mode="compact",
    use_async=True
)

query_engine = index.as_query_engine(
    response_synthesizer=response_synthesizer,
    similarity_top_k=5
)

draft = query_engine.query("Draft professional response to invoice query")
print(draft.response)
